$comment: Reusable secret-isolation fixture (KRT-BD003). Stages representative, non-real provider and MCP credentials confined to the integration edge. The KRT-BD004 secret-isolation check set configures these on a turn and the shared runner-owned secret-absence helper asserts none of `secretValues` (or their common encoded variants) appear in persisted kernel records, captured canonical stream events, captured telemetry attributes or error summaries, or the recorded transcript.
